title: Security: Chrome Update - Arbitrary Folder Delete // Privilege Escalation
description_snippet:
Google Chrome Updater - mklink folder junction - delete folder recursively as SYSTEM-User  
  
**VERSION**   
  
Chrome Version: all  
Operating System: Windows 10, 10.0.19041.329, 2004  
  
**REPRODUCTION CASE**   
  
1. Create junction as non-admin -> mklink /j c:\windows\temp\CR_00000.tmp c:\  
2
